project_type: Static e-commerce website - pure HTML/CSS/JS, no build step
build_system: None - pure static files ready to deploy directly to Cloudflare Pages
test_framework: Manual browser testing - static site with no test runner
test_command: Validate HTML structure exists and JS has no syntax errors: node -c for JS files
verification_instructions: 1. Verify all HTML files exist at expected paths. 2. Check JS files for syntax errors via node -c. 3. Verify directory structure follows Cloudflare Pages clean URL conventions.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - greenfield static site project
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network mode - NO npm install, no package downloads, no CDN fetches at build time. Must use plain HTML/CSS/JS. Google Fonts can be loaded via link tag in HTML (runtime browser fetch). No Tailwind CLI, no PostCSS, no build tools.
key_patterns: Directory-based routing for Cloudflare Pages clean URLs (e.g., /shop/index.html serves as /shop). All CSS in a single stylesheet. JS modularized by concern. Inline SVG for logo. Product data stored in a JS data file.
directory_structure: zevrian-site/ at workspace root. index.html at root. /css/ for styles, /js/ for scripts, /images/ for placeholder assets. Each page in its own directory with index.html for clean URLs. /shop/ has category subdirectories and /product/ subdirectory for individual product pages.
